questions.question: What does shallowRef track compared to a regular ref?
options: Only .value replacement: mutations to nested properties are NOT tracked
Only the first level of nested properties

questions.question: You have shallowRef items = shallowRef([]). You call items.value.push(newItem). What happens?
options: The component re-renders with the new item
The push happens but does NOT trigger a re-render
The push is ignored and items stays empty

questions.question: What function can you call to manually trigger an update after mutating a shallowRef's inner value?
